overview: Specter is a Normal-class Undead monster. 1 grades: Common. Base stats (Common): 9999 HP, 0 physical damage, 200 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 999, MaxImpactEndurance 999. 0 attacks, 0 combo chains.

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

status_effects_detail.name: Possession
status_effects_detail.counter: Watch for the Possession icon on your status bar.

strategies.title: High Impact Values (ImpactRes 999, Endurance 999)
strategies.description: ImpactResistance 999 and MaxImpactEndurance 999. This monster does not have a Staggered ability in its ability set.

strategies.title: Projectile Reduction: 300
strategies.description: Has 300 ProjectileReductionMod, reducing physical projectile damage.

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
